info.title: Developer API
info.description:
Boost your fleet's efficiency: Automate and optimise management tasks seamlessly with the comprehensive API for superior tracking and control.

 Utilise the APIs with a 25k daily call allowance to elevate, streamline, and enhance your fleet performance unprecedentedly.


 [Try it out](/open-api/api-doc.html)

tags.name: School Services
tags.description: API services for school bus module

tags.name: Alerts
tags.description:
Stay in control of your fleet using API service for vehicle alerts.

Track vehicles entering or leaving specific areas, view all alerts instantly, and customise settings for enhanced management. Get actionable insights in real-time to optimise your fleet operations.

tags.name: Account features
tags.description:
Access powerful tools for managing your fleet efficiently. 

Arrange vehicles, monitor departments and drivers, classify vehicles by type, make, and model, and personalise user access, time zones, subscription plans, Points of Interest (PoIs), and device settings with ease to suit your requirements seamlessly

tags.name: Vehicle Trips
tags.description:
Use the API to simplify fleet tasks: list vehicles, track locations and history, view trips, check nearby and idling vehicles, and get detailed snapshots for better efficiency and control.

Plus, update virtual odometer or engine hours for precise maintenance planning and performance tracking.

tags.name: Geo Fence
tags.description: Enhance control with GeoFence for precise location management. Create or update points of interest (PoI) to easily manage geographical boundaries and improve security and efficiency.

tags.name: Vehicle Tracking
tags.description:
Use the API to simplify fleet tasks: list vehicles, track locations and history, view trips, check nearby and idling vehicles, and get detailed snapshots for better efficiency and control.

Plus, update virtual odometer or engine hours for precise maintenance planning and performance tracking.

put.description: Maintain precise maintenance timelines and assess engine performance effortlessly by updating engine hours.

parameters.name: studentCode

get.description: Access departments to enhance coordination and workflow efficiency.

post.description: Establish organisation units to streamline administrative processes.

get.description: Retrieve all waypoints easily to ensure comprehensive location data access.
Easily retrieve a comprehensive list of all vehicles within your fleet, ensuring complete visibility and control.
Get vehicle types for accurate categorization and inventory management.
Access vehicle subscriptions to stay informed about service status and renewals.
Obtain immediate insights into the current status of your vehicles, including operational conditions and performance indicators.

parameters.name: statusFilter
parameters.description: Status values that need to be considered for filter. ( M-Moving, S-Stopped, D-Disconnected, O-Out of Network )

get.description: Access comprehensive raw data for individual vehicles to inform decision-making and analysis.
Gain a holistic view of each vehicle's specifications, configurations, and performance metrics.
Identify vehicle models to facilitate maintenance and parts management.
Get vehicle makes to analyse fleet composition and performance by brand.
Retrieve vehicle groups to efficiently organise and manage your fleet.
Get current location of a vehicle.
Retrieve user details to manage access and permissions within the system.
Gain a holistic view of each vehicle's specifications, configurations, and performance metrics.
Access time zones to accurately track vehicle activity across different regions.
Retrieve subscription plans tailored to your fleet's needs and budget.
Track student transportation history efficiently, providing valuable insights for optimising routes and schedules.
Streamline organisation using an easy-to-navigate roster for efficient monitoring.
Get student image
Facilitate effective communication by retrieving parent details swiftly fostering seamless parent-school interaction.
Access school division information seamlessly through our API's to streamline administrative processes and facilitate efficient resource allocation.
Effortlessly access class details to enhance scheduling efficiency.
Get school alerts
Identify nearby vehicles based on geographic proximity, facilitating better resource allocation and dispatching.
Access all established boundaries for efficient security and management.
Retrieve driver information to monitor and optimise driver performance.
Access device names for easy identification and tracking of fleet devices.
Retrieve country information to accommodate international operations and regulations.
Access APN lists by country ID to ensure proper network connectivity.
Access all alerts generated within a day.
Explore different categories of alerts available.

studentCode.description: Unique identification Code/Id for the student. Reffered as 'StudentId' in 'AVLView' web application

startHour.description: start hour Time in 24 Hour format

fuelMilliVolt.description: Voltage in milli volt from fuel sensor

externalPower.description: Vehicle battery power voltage ( milli volt)

moving.description: Number of vehicles that are currently moving

outOfNetWork.description: Number of vehicles that are currently out of Network

disconnected.description: Number of vehicles that are currently in disconnected state

idling.description: Number of vehicles that are idling

idle.description: Number of vehicles that are currently in idle state

stopped.description: Number of vehicles that are currently stopped

alerts.description: Number of alerts in all vehicles

groupName.description: This is for vehicle group name

colour.description: This is for vehicle colour code

isDefault.description: This is for group’s default value

isdCode.description: This for isd code of the country
This for isd code of country
